---
title: 'Hollywood'
date: '2012-04-09T04:33:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '720695843144412653'
blogger_filename: '/2012/04/hollywood.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Life Events'
---

What I believe I heard: "If I gave you a job in Hollywood... would you take it?"<br />
<br />
Remember when I asked several times a few years ago: "Would you be willing to assist a pastor who is building a church?"<br />
<br />
...<br />
<br />
Today I saw Stephen and Kelli Swisher visited: Spirit Food Christian Center<br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.myspiritfood.com/index.php">http://www.myspiritfood.com/index.php</a>
<br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hYcOKkIz848&amp;context=C4d5268fADvjVQa1PpcFOfpoyBOHq0sX9OtDsXxjLfJElbVHZpv8Y=">http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hYcOKkIz848&amp;context=C4d5268fADvjVQa1PpcFOfpoyBOHq0sX9OtDsXxjLfJElbVHZpv8Y=</a>
<br />
<br />
<a href="http://maps.google.com/maps?f=q&amp;source=s_q&amp;hl=en&amp;geocode=&amp;q=20550+Roscoe+Blvd,+San+Fernando+Valley,+CA+91306&amp;sll=37.0625,-95.677068&amp;sspn=56.856075,135.263672&amp;ie=UTF8&amp;hq=&amp;hnear=20550+Roscoe+Blvd,+Los+Angeles,+California+91306&amp;view=map">http://maps.google.com/maps?f=q&amp;source=s_q&amp;hl=en&amp;geocode=&amp;q=20550+Roscoe+Blvd,+San+Fernando+Valley,+CA+91306&amp;sll=37.0625,-95.677068&amp;sspn=56.856075,135.263672&amp;ie=UTF8&amp;hq=&amp;hnear=20550+Roscoe+Blvd,+Los+Angeles,+California+91306&amp;view=map</a>
<br />
<br />
Not far from Hollywood... Hmm... I'll keep that on the shelf and ponder it.
